'''vaduwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:psalter|psalter]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-d-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:psalter|psalter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vaduwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vædiwith|vædiwith]] || [[word:vædiwij|vædiwij]] || [[word:vædiwish|vædiwish]] || [[word:vædiwi|vædiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vaduduwuth|vaduduwuth]] || [[word:vaduduwuj|vaduduwuj]] || [[word:vaduduwush|vaduduwush]] || [[word:vaduduwu|vaduduwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vaduwuth|vaduwuth]] || [[word:vaduwuj|vaduwuj]] || [[word:vaduwush|vaduwush]] || [[word:vaduwu|vaduwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vadufwuth|vadufwuth]] || [[word:vadufwuj|vadufwuj]] || [[word:vadufwush|vadufwush]] || [[word:vadufwuf|vadufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vaduwuthu|vaduwuthu]] || [[word:vaduwuju|vaduwuju]] || [[word:vaduwushu|vaduwushu]] || [[word:vaduwuku|vaduwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vaduwuth|vaduwuth]] || [[word:vaduwuj|vaduwuj]] || [[word:vaduwush|vaduwush]] || [[word:vaduwu|vaduwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vaduwuthul|vaduwuthul]] || [[word:vaduwujul|vaduwujul]] || [[word:vaduwushul|vaduwushul]] || [[word:vaduwukul|vaduwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vaduwuthuthu|vaduwuthuthu]] || [[word:vaduwujuju|vaduwujuju]] || [[word:vaduwushushu|vaduwushushu]] || [[word:vaduwuku|vaduwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vaduwuthun|vaduwuthun]] || [[word:vaduwujun|vaduwujun]] || [[word:vaduwushun|vaduwushun]] || [[word:vaduwukun|vaduwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vaduwuthuoro|vaduwuthuoro]] || [[word:vaduwujuoro|vaduwujuoro]] || [[word:vaduwushuoro|vaduwushuoro]] || [[word:vaduwukuoro|vaduwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
